products.name: Tropical Runtz Pod 1G

Tropical Runtz is a variation of the Runtz strain, leaning heavily toward the Sativa side. It is renowned for its vibrant, sweet tropical fruit flavor and an uplifting, functional high. This pod is a highly popular choice for its cheerful high and intense candy flavor.

Ideal for daytime productivity or social settings, this 1000mg pod offers a flavorful, "feel-good" experience that stays true to its legendary namesake.

products.name: Blue Razzmataz All in One 1G

Combining ultra-pure, triple-distilled oil with botanical and cannabis-derived terpenes, CAT4 has captured the nostalgic essence of tart blue raspberries and sweet berries. This rechargeable disposable delivers a balanced, euphoric high that provides an immediate mood boost before settling into a soft physical calm, all while meeting the industry's strictest CAT4 purity standards. Whether you’re looking for a discreet daytime lift or a flavorful way to unwind in the evening, Blue Razzmataz offers a smooth, reliable, and high-octane experience at a price that redefines "value" in the California market.

products.name: Granddaddy Purple Pod 1G

products.name: Cat 4 Pod Battery
products.shortDescription: CAT4 Cat 4 Pod Battery with 0% THC
products.description: The CAT 4 POD BATTERY is a rechargeable power source designed for use with a specific type of THC oil pod system. The "CAT4" name, often associated with a California brand like Catalyst Cannabis or in the context of disposable vapes by brands like Hype Train, indicates a proprietary or specialized battery platform that accepts corresponding pod-style cartridges rather than the common 510 thread screw-on cartridges. If you are looking at purchasing the CAT 4 POD BATTERY, you are buying the rechargeable hardware needed to consume oil from specialized CAT4-compatible vape pods.
